SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
CreditCard
 
CreditCardRepository
CreditCardRepository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for the CreditCard collection in MongoDB.
CreditCardType
Enum to represent different types of Credit Cards.
OTPRequest
This class represents an OTP request associated with a specific credit card.
OTPRequestRepository
OTPRequestRepository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for the OTPRequest collection in MongoDB.
OtpVerificationRequest
 
PaymentConfig
 
PaymentController
Controller for handling payment-related operations.
PaymentRequest
 
PaymentService
Service class responsible for handling payment operations like adding credit cards, initiating payments, and OTP verification.
PaymentserviceApplication
 
RecurringPayment
 
RecurringPaymentRepository
 
RecurringService
 
SearchController
 
SearchService
 
TopUpRequest
 
Transaction
The Transaction class represents a credit card transaction in the system.
TransactionNotFoundException
 
TransactionRepository
TransactionRepository provides CRUD operations and custom queries for the Transaction collection in MongoDB.
